meaning: art.一(在元音字母前代替不定代词a) [域] Netherlands Antilles ,荷兰属地
examples: This recipe is an adaptation of an old favourite.
The exam consists of an essay and an unseen translation.

They were fleeing an attack by the Janjaweed, the dreaded Arab militia backed by Sudan's government.
